definition: Unique document identifier. Format: LE-[TIER]-[NNN].
Current curation status. RETIRED entries are kept to avoid re-evaluation.
valid_values_or_format: DRAFT | APPROVED | INGESTED | REJECTED | WATCH | RETIRED

definition: Pipeline tier that selected this document.

Role of this entry in the seed strategy. expansion = active retrieval root (used to drive OpenAlex one-hop); landmark_anchor = foundational item that shapes graph structure but is not an active retrieval root; framing = used for scoring/topic shaping only; bridge = non-LE paper included because it bridges into LE topics.
⚓ foundational anchor | ✅ current (last 5yr) | ⚠️ aging (5–15yr)
Full title. Do not abbreviate.
First author et al. For grey lit, use organization name.
Year of publication or posting (preprints).
Journal, conference, or publisher. For grey lit: organization.
Full DOI URL. Required for peer-reviewed papers.
One topic code from Topic Map.
Comma-separated topic codes (max 3). Substantive content only.
Required if secondary_topics non-empty. One sentence per secondary topic.
Resource type from Content Type Taxonomy.
valid_values_or_format: AP | SG | GL | PC | PP | CE | TP | CO

definition: Primary geographic scope.
Target learner/population described.
valid_values_or_format: K12 | Higher Ed | Workforce | Researchers | All

definition: Study design or document type.
valid_values_or_format: RCT | Quasi-exp | Survey | Review | Framework | Grey Lit | Standards

definition: Number of T1 seeds in whose 1-hop neighborhood this paper appears.
Comma-separated corpus_ids of connected seeds.
max(citation_percentile, velocity_percentile) within qualifying topic.
Topic code in which paper achieved qualifying subdomain_score.
Total citations at time of pipeline run. Source: OpenAlex or Semantic Scholar.
Citations in last 2 years / paper_age_in_years.
How document was identified. Be specific.
valid_values_or_format: Seed — T00 textbook anchor | IEEE ICICLE resources page | T2 expansion from LE-T1-008

definition: Seed or anchor IDs from which paper was reached in one-hop expansion.
Whether resource appears on IEEE ICICLE resources page.
Quality assurance notes or flags for reviewer attention.
Required if status = REJECTED.
Required if status = RETIRED. Records the corpus version or date when this entry was retired. Entries are never deleted — they are retired so the record is preserved for audit.
Date row was added. Format YYYY-MM-DD.
Date reviewed for APPROVED or REJECTED.
Name or initials of reviewer.
